data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario of SQL injection attempts.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the outcome of SQL injection attempts in every text field. However, the evidence provided does not include any results or traces from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected behavior was observed or if a failure report was generated. Without this critical information, it is impossible to assess whether the requirement has been met, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of the outcome of SQL injection attempts being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Capture and report SQL injection test results
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete evidence of the results from the SQL injection simulation.
